feedItems.description: allocated £8.9m to Environment & Streets (≈£57 per resident)
allocated £4.3m to Council Running Costs (≈£28 per resident)
allocated £4.8m to Culture & Leisure (≈£31 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £84 (4.0%) to £2178
